summary: Test suite has good structural organization and reasonable happy-path coverage, but is significantly incomplete. Critical issues: (1) Fixture files referenced in run_tests.py (e.g., fixtures/package_all_approved.json) and config/license_config.json are not provided—tests cannot run as written. (2) CLI main() function untested directly, only via act integration. (3) Limited edge case testing across all groups (no case sensitivity, whitespace variation, unusual format combinations). (4) Integration tests cover only 3 successful act scenarios; no error cases tested (missing files, invalid config). (5) No end-to-end tests for requirements.txt through act. (6) Report formatting tests only check substrings, not exact output format. (7) Custom Python act harness instead of pytest, making test discovery and standard CI/CD integration awkward. Tests would catch basic regressions but miss edge cases, parsing errors, and many boundary conditions.
